posts.cooked:
I will dub LBA 1 to Continental Portuguese, but I cant do all voices (Zoe for example).

We NEED help, so if youre Portuguese or Brazilian and you can act, please help! Se voc Portugus ou Brasileiro e voc pode faz-o, por favor, ajude-nos!

We especially need a girl voice. Nos especialmente precisamos de uma voz feminina!

Heh cool

Good luck. Original post there btw
- CF: If you know any Portuguese or Brazilian people down there in Israel, please talk to them, and ask them, if they would like to help me with this dubbing.
All brazilians I know are from the MBN.
I think we have a few Brazilian volunteers at Magen .

So, morshem, you ask them, OK?

WE NEED MORE PORTUGUESE AND BRAZILIANS FOR THE DUBBING ! ! ! !
NOS PRECISAMOS DE MAIS PORTUGUSES E BRASILEIROS PELA GRAVAO ! ! ! !

PLEASE, HELP US ! ! ! !
POR FAVOR, AJUDE NOS ! ! ! !

Dont you have enough brazilians in brazil? Do you really need mor to ask a few brazilian volunteers in his kibbutz to help you?

CrAzY

- CF and morshem: as I said once in this forum, I am Brazilian, but I dont live in Brazil. I live in Slovenia, because my mother met my step-father, who is Slovenian, and then we moved to Slovenia. I was 11 at the time. How do you think I have an Europen version of LBA 1? And how do you think I met N-SoftInd and lbaguy3d? This is why I need the help from this forum. Please help me.

Yes, but do you actually expcet me to talk with a few people, who I have never seen before, and I doubt can even speak English (not to mention Hebrew), and ask them to waste their time in recording dubbing for a game they probably never even heard of, and most likely dont give a damn about?

- morshem: I know.

PLEASE, READ THIS THREAD, PORTUGUESE AND BRAZILIAN PEOPLE ! ! ! !
POR FAVOR, QUE A GENTE PORTUGUSA E BRASILEIRA LEIA ISTO THREAD ! ! ! !

Sorry, cant help you.
Ask SGK and Talles and the other brazilians/portuguese.
